text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
179 
NDC_QTY_ALOWD 
LABEL: 
NDC Quantity Allowed 
DESCRIPTION: The maximum allowable quantity of a drug or service that may be dispensed per prescription per date 
of service or per month. 
SHORT NAME: NDC_QTY_ALOWD 
LONG NAME: NDC_QTY_ALOWD 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX line 
VALUES: 
Numeric value with three decimal places 
Ex. 10.500
